name: Apple Mash (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel potatoes. Cook them in salted, boiling water until tender.
2. Peel, core, and slice the cooking apples. Place them in a pot with 1 tablespoon of water and the sugar.
3. Cook the apples until they are soft.
4. Drain the cooked potatoes and mash them thoroughly.
5. Beat in the mashed apples and butter. This mash pairs well with bacon or fried herring.
This revised recipe maintains the original title, ingredients, and instructions while ensuring clarity and consistency.
